title: castanopsis trinervis
intro: Castanopsis trinervis, also known as the three-veined chinquapin, is a species of evergreen tree native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Castanopsis trinervis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the bark is prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies.
